questions.question: In a certain code language ‘CLOCK’ is coded as ‘23633’, ‘LIGHT’ is coded as ‘28793’. In the same language how ‘KITCHEN’ be coded. ? >एक निश्चित कोड भाषा में ‘CLOCK’ को ‘23633’, ‘LIGHT’ को ‘28793’ लिखा जाता है। उसी भाषा में ‘KITCHEN’ को कैसे लिखा जाएगा?
questions.explanation: Hence, option C is correct. > अतः विकल्प C सही है।

questions.question: Select the option that represents the letters that, when placed from left to right in the following blanks, will complete the letter-series? L __ R Q __ S __ P __ Q S __ L P __ Q __ __ >उस विकल्प का चयन करें जो उन अक्षरों को दर्शाता है, जो निम्नलिखित रिक्त स्थानों में बाएं से दाएं रखने पर अक्षर-श्रृंखला को पूरा करेंगे? L __ R Q __ S __ P __ Q S __ L P __ Q __ __
questions.explanation: opt [A] L P R Q S S/L P R Q S S/L P R Q SS > opt [A] L P R Q S S/L P R Q S S/L P R Q SS

questions.question: Pointing to a woman in photograph a man said ‘She is the daughter of my mother’s elder sister’ how is he related to the woman in the photograph? >तस्वीर में एक महिला की ओर इशारा करते हुए एक आदमी ने कहा ‘वह मेरी माँ की बड़ी बहन की बेटी है’ वह तस्वीर में महिला से कैसे संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Mother’s elder sister’s daughter is one’s cousin sister. Hence, the man is cousin brother. > माँ की बड़ी बहन की बेटी किसी की मौसेरी बहन होती है। इसलिए, वह आदमी मौसेरा भाई है।

questions.question: Select the option that is related to the sixth term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term and the fourth term is related to the third term. 96 :54 :: 84 :32 :: 56 : ? >उस विकल्प का चयन कीजिए जो छठे पद से उसी प्रकार संबंधित है जिस प्रकार दूसरा पद पहले पद से संबंधित है और चौथा पद तीसरे पद से संबंधित है। 96 :54 :: 84 :32 :: 56 : ?

Three of the following four groups are alike in some manner and hence form a group. Which group does not belong to the group? >निम्नलिखित चार समूहों में से तीन किसी तरह से एक जैसे हैं और इसलिए एक समूह बनाते हैं। कौन सा समूह इस समूह से संबंधित नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Odd – D > Odd – D

questions.question: Today is Saturday, what will be the day after 120 days from today. ? >आज शनिवार है, आज से 120 दिन बाद कौन सा दिन होगा?
questions.explanation: →Remainder=+1 Saturday +1 = Sunday Hence, option D is correct. > →शेष=+1 शनिवार +1 = रविवार अतः, विकल्प D सही है।

questions.question: Select the option that is related to the sixth term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term and the fourth term is related to the third term. EMBERGO :VNCVSHL :: ORANGE :LSZOHV :: SUNDAY : ? >उस विकल्प का चयन कीजिए जो छठे पद से उसी प्रकार संबंधित है जिस प्रकार दूसरा पद पहले पद से संबंधित है और चौथा पद तीसरे पद से संबंधित है। EMBERGO :VNCVSHL :: ORANGE :LSZOHV :: SUNDAY : ?
questions.explanation: Vowel – opposite letter Consonant – immediately following letter Hence, option B is correct. > स्वर – विपरीत अक्षर व्यंजन – तुरंत बाद वाला अक्षर अतः विकल्प B सही है।

questions.question: Select the option in which the numbers share the same relationship as that shared by the given pair of numbers. [NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g. 13 – Operations on 13 such as adding/deleting/multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.] [132, 8, 14] [387, 17, 26] >वह विकल्प चुनें जिसमें संख्याएँ उसी संबंध को साझा करती हैं जो दिए गए संख्याओं के जोड़े द्वारा साझा किया जाता है। [नोट: संख्याओं को उसके घटक अंकों में तोड़े बिना, पूर्ण संख्याओं पर संचालन किया जाना चाहिए। उदाहरण के लिए 13 - 13 पर संचालन जैसे कि 13 में जोड़ना/हटाना/गुणा करना आदि किया जा सकता है। 13 को 1 और 3 में तोड़ना और फिर 1 और 3 पर गणितीय संचालन करने की अनुमति नहीं है।] [132, 8, 14] [387, 17, 26]

What will come in the place of question mark {?} in the following equation if ‘+’ and ‘×’ are interchanged and ‘÷‘ and ‘−’ are interchanged? 64−32×8+12÷24 =? >निम्नलिखित समीकरण में प्रश्न चिह्न {?} के स्थान पर क्या आएगा यदि ‘+’ और ‘×’ को परस्पर बदल दिया जाए तथा ‘÷‘ और ‘−’ को परस्पर बदल दिया जाए? 64−32×8+12÷24 =?

Which two sign and number should be interchanged to make the equation correct? 12 + 6 × 2 – 9 ÷ 3 = 5 >समीकरण को सही बनाने के लिए कौन से दो चिह्न और संख्या को परस्पर बदलना चाहिए? 12 + 6 × 2 – 9 ÷ 3 = 5

Blind >कौन सा विकल्प दिए गए शब्दों के सही क्रम को दर्शाता है जैसा कि वे अंग्रेजी शब्दकोष में दिखाई देंगे? 1. Blemish 2. Blister 3. Blend 4. Blunt 5. Black 6. Blind

Three statements are given, followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follows from the statements? Statements: 1. All Balls are Rounds. 2. Some Rounds are Square. 3. No Square is a triangle. Conclusion: I. No Round is a triangle II. No triangle is a square III. Some Rounds are Balls
options: Only conclusion I and II follows
Only conclusion II and III follows
questions.explanation: I. False → Can’t establish from the given statement. II. True → as No square is triangle. III. True → Can be established, from the given figure.

questions.explanation: Enormous : Miniscule [Opposite words] [C]Generous : Stingy

questions.explanation: Hence, option B is correct.

questions.question: Which of the following option figure will complete the given figure. >निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी विकल्प आकृति दी गई आकृति को पूरा करेगी।

Select the option figure in which the given figureis embedded as its part [rotation NOT allowed]. >उस विकल्प आकृति का चयन करें जिसमें दी गई आकृति उसके भाग के रूप में अंतर्निहित है [घूर्णन की अनुमति नहीं है]।
A paper is folded and punched as shown below. How will it appear when unfolded? >एक कागज़ को मोड़कर उसमें छेद किया गया है जैसा कि नीचे दिखाया गया है। इसे खोलने पर यह कैसा दिखाई देगा?
Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed at XY as shown below. >दी गई आकृति की सही दर्पण छवि का चयन करें जब दर्पण को XY पर रखा गया है जैसा कि नीचे दिखाया गया है।

Select the figure from among the given options that can replace the question mark ‘?’ in the following series. >दिए गए विकल्पों में से उस आकृति का चयन कीजिए जो निम्नलिखित श्रृंखला में प्रश्न चिह्न ‘?’ के स्थान पर आ सकती है।
questions.explanation: Arrow is rotating anti clock wise direction at 90°. The direction of the arrow is in the upper side. And the letter is increasing in the following order: J + 3 = M, M + 4 = Q, Q + 5 = V, V + 6 = B Hence, the correct answer is option B. >तीर घड़ी की विपरीत दिशा में 90° पर घूम रहा है। तीर की दिशा ऊपर की ओर है। और अक्षर निम्न क्रम में बढ़ रहे हैं: J + 3 = M, M + 4 = Q, Q + 5 = V, V + 6 = B अतः सही उत्तर विकल्प B है।

questions.question: Who among the following was the Governor of Bengal in the battle of Buxar from British Side?
questions.explanation: • Henry Vansittart was the Governor of Bengal from 1760 to 1765. He was in charge during the Battle of Buxar in 1764. • Major Hector Munro led the British forces in the battle. • Robert Clive was the Governor of Bengal twice, from 1757–1760 and again from 1765–1767. • Lord William Bentick the first Governor General of India in 1833.

questions.question: Which leader gave us the C. R. Formula?
questions.explanation: The C R Formula a set of plans was proposed by C. Rajagopalachari, in 1944, aimed to resolve the political deadlock between the Indian National Congress [INC] and the Muslim League when the British government states that if the Indian National Congress and the Muslim League resolved their differences, Indian statehood would be possible this event was took place during the Second World War.

questions.question: Who got the throne after death of the founder of Mamluk dynasty?
questions.explanation: Aram Shah succeeded Qutbuddin Aibak as the Sultan of Delhi and ruled from December 1210 to June 1211 but was later deposed by Iltutmish because he was considered a weak and incompetent ruler by the court elite. Iltutmish was the son-in-law of Qutbuddin Aibak.

questions.question: Ashoka appointed an officer to solve the social problems in his reign named?
questions.explanation: Ashoka appointed officers called Dhamma-mahamatta to address social problems during his reign, responsible for spreading his message of Dhamma [righteousness] throughout his empire. Other Officers:- Sannidhata: chief treasury officer. Samharata: Collector General of Revenue. Gopa: Responsible for accounts. Akshpatala: Account General. Samshthadhyaksha: responsible for market affairs. Navadhyaksh: Responsible for ships.

questions.question: Who among the following personalities is associated with the Mohiniyattam dance?
questions.explanation: Jayaprabha Menon is associated with the Mohiniyattam dance. Famous exponents associated with the Mohiniyattam dance are:- Sunanda Nair, Gopika Varma, Smitha Rajan, Kalamandalam Kalyanikutty Amma, Pallavi Krishnan, Vijayalakshmi, Radha Dutta, Rema Shrikant, Kalamandalam Kshemavathy, and Madhuri Amma.

questions.question: To which state does the Bagh style of textile art printing belong?
questions.explanation: The Bagh style of textile art printing belongs to the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. Other related points:- 1. Kalamkari: From Andhra Pradesh and some villages in Tamil Nadu. 2. Madhubani: Also known as Mithila painting, this folk art is from Bihar. 3. Warli: This monochromatic art style is from the rural districts of Thane and Nasik in Maharashtra. 4. Tanjore: This art style is from Thanjavur in Tamil Nadu. 5. Phad: This art form originated in Rajasthan, and the paintings are made on large pieces of fabric or canvas called “phad”. 6. Gond: This traditional art form is from the Gond tribal community of Madhya Pradesh. 7. Pithora: This art form is from Madhya Pradesh, and is created by multiple artists working together. 8. Manjusha: Also known as Manjusha Kala, this art form is from Bhagalpur in Bihar. 9. Aipan from Uttarakhand. 10. Sanjhi from Uttar Pradesh. 11. Cheriyal Scroll Painting from Telangana. 12. Pattachitra from Odisha. 13. Basholi from Jammu and Kashmir. 14. Kangra Painting from Himachal Pradesh.

questions.question: Kanchendzonga Biosphere Reserve is located in which of the following state?
questions.explanation: The Khangchendzonga Biosphere Reserve is located in the state of Sikkim. There are 18 Biosphere Reserves in India, which are respectively:- 1. Cold Desert, Himachal Pradesh 2. Nanda Devi, Uttrakhand 3. Khangchendzonga, Sikkim 4. Dehang-Debang, Arunachal Pradesh 5. Manas, Assam 6. Dibru-Saikhowa, Assam 7. Nokrek, Meghalaya 8. Panna, Madhya Pradesh 9. Pachmarhi, Madhya Pradesh 10. Achanakmar-Amarkantak, Madhya Pradesh-Chattisgarh 11. Kachchh, Gujarat 12. Similipal, Odisha 13. Sundarban, West Bengal 14. Seshachalam, Andhra Pradesh 15. Agasthyamala, Karnataka-Tamil Nadu-Kerala 16. Nilgiri, Tamil Nadu-Kerala 17. Gulf of Mannar, Tamil Nadu 18. Great Nicobar, Andaman & Nicobar Island

questions.question: Who was the father of Indian Census?
questions.explanation: Henry Walter is known as the father of the Indian census. In 1830, he conducted the first complete census of an Indian city in Dacca [now Dhaka, Bangladesh].

questions.question: Match the following: Rivers Origin A) Brahmaputra 1) Chemayungdung Glacier B) Narmada 2) Amarkantak C) Kaveri 3) Brahmagiri Range D) Ganga 4) Gangotri Glacier
questions.explanation: Name of river Origin place Brahmaputra Chemayungdung Glacier Narmada Amarkantak Kaveri Brahmagiri Range Ganga Gangotri Glacier

questions.question: India became a party to the Ramsar Convention in?
questions.explanation: India became a party to the Ramsar Convention on February 1, 1982. The Ramsar Convention, also known as the “Convention on Wetlands,” was signed in Ramsar, Iran in 1971, and India joined as a contracting party on February 1, 1982.

questions.question: Which layer of earth is responsible for earth’s magnetic field? > पृथ्वी के चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के लिए पृथ्वी की कौन सी परत जिम्मेदार है?
questions.explanation: The layer of the Earth responsible for its magnetic field is the outer core. The Earth’s magnetic field is generated by the movement of molten iron in the outer core, which creates electric currents that produce the magnetic field. The Earth is made up of four main layers: the crust, mantle, outer core, and inner core. > पृथ्वी के चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के लिए जिम्मेदार पृथ्वी की परत बाहरी कोर है। पृथ्वी का चुंबकीय क्षेत्र बाहरी कोर में पिघले हुए लोहे की गति से उत्पन्न होता है, जो चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का उत्पादन करने वाली विद्युत धाराएं बनाता है। पृथ्वी चार मुख्य परतों से बनी है: क्रस्ट, मेंटल, बाहरी कोर और आंतरिक कोर।

questions.question: The type of forest located in mid latitudinal Coastal region? > मध्य अक्षांशीय तटीय क्षेत्र में स्थित वन का प्रकार क्या है?
questions.explanation: Temperate evergreen forests are found in the mid-latitudinal coastal regions. They are located on the eastern margins of continents, such as in the south-eastern United States, southeast Brazil, and southeast China. There are five categories of forests in India. These are Tropical evergreen forests, Tropical deciduous forests, Tropical thorn forests, Mountain forests, Swamp forests. > शीतोष्ण सदाबहार वन मध्य अक्षांशीय तटीय क्षेत्रों में पाए जाते हैं। वे महाद्वीपों के पूर्वी छोरों पर स्थित हैं, जैसे दक्षिण-पूर्वी संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका, दक्षिण-पूर्व ब्राजील और दक्षिण-पूर्व चीन में। भारत में वनों की पाँच श्रेणियाँ हैं। ये उष्णकटिबंधीय सदाबहार वन, उष्णकटिबंधीय पर्णपाती वन, उष्णकटिबंधीय कांटेदार वन, पर्वतीय वन, दलदली वन हैं।

questions.question: Articles ________ come under part VI of the Indian constitution and deals with state legislature:
questions.explanation: Articles 168 to 212 come under Chapter III of Part VI of the Indian constitution and deals with state legislature. Part VI of the Constitution of India, titled “The States”. Other chapters of part VI are: Chapter I: General [Article 152] Chapter II: The Executive [Article 153 to 167] Chapter IV: Legislative Power of the Governor [Article 213] Chapter V: The High Courts in the States [Article 214 to 231] Chapter VI: Subordinate Courts [Article 233 to 237]

questions.question: ‘Prerogative Writs’ feature borrowed from which the following countries? > 'प्रिरोगेटिव रिट्स' फीचर निम्नलिखित देशों से उधार लिया गया है?
questions.explanation: The feature of prerogative writs in the Indian Constitution was borrowed from England [UK]. Prerogative writs are a legal remedy that allows people to seek judicial intervention when their rights are violated are used to safeguard fundamental rights. The Supreme Court and high courts in India can issue writs of habeas corpus, mandamus, prohibition, certiorari, and quo-warranto. These writs are incorporated in Articles 32 and 226 of the Indian Constitution respectively. > भारतीय संविधान में विशेषाधिकार रिटों की विशेषता इंग्लैंड [यूके] से उधार ली गई थी। विशेषाधिकार रिट एक कानूनी उपाय है जो लोगों को न्यायिक हस्तक्षेप की तलाश करने की अनुमति देता है जब उनके अधिकारों का उल्लंघन किया जाता है तो मौलिक अधिकारों की रक्षा के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है। भारत में सर्वोच्च न्यायालय और उच्च न्यायालय बंदी प्रत्यक्षीकरण, परमादेश, निषेध, उत्प्रेषण और यथा-वारंटो की रिट जारी कर सकते हैं। इन रिटों को क्रमशः भारतीय संविधान के अनुच्छेद 32 और 226 में शामिल किया गया है।

questions.question: Which of the following is a type of plant disease? > निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा पौधे की बीमारी का एक प्रकार है?
questions.explanation: Blight: A disease that spreads by windborne spores and can kill large area of plants. Fungal diseases: - Blight, Downy mildew, White mold, Rust, Leaf spot etc. Bacterial diseases: - Black rot, Bacterial canker, Soft rot, Leaf spot wilt etc. Viral diseases:- Mosaic [virus], Tomato spotted wilt [virus], Potato [virus], Tomato yellow leaf curl [virus], Cucumber mosaic virus. Mastitis is an inflammation of breast tissue that can cause swelling, pain, redness, and warmth. Botulism is a rare but serious illness. It is caused by a toxin that attacks the body’s nerves and causes difficulty breathing, muscle paralysis, and even death. Coccidiosis is a gastrointestinal disease caused by coccidia, a microscopic protozoan parasite that infects the intestinal walls of animals. > ब्लाइट: एक बीमारी जो हवा के बीजाणुओं से फैलती है और पौधों की बड़ी संख्या को मार सकती है। फफूंद रोग:- ब्लाइट, डाउनी फफूंदी, सफेद फफूंदी, जंग, लीफ स्पॉट आदि। जीवाणु रोग:- काला सड़न, जीवाणु नासर, नरम सड़न, पत्ती धब्बे विल्ट आदि। वायरल रोग:- मोज़ेक [वायरस], टमाटर धब्बेदार विल्ट [वायरस], आलू [वायरस], टमाटर पीले पत्ते कर्ल [वायरस], ककड़ी मोज़ेक वायरस। मास्टिटिस स्तन ऊतक की सूजन है जो सूजन, दर्द, लालिमा और गर्मी पैदा कर सकती है। बोटुलिज़्म एक दुर्लभ लेकिन गंभीर बीमारी है। यह एक विष के कारण होता है जो शरीर की नसों पर हमला करता है और सांस लेने में कठिनाई, मांसपेशियों के पक्षाघात और यहां तक कि मृत्यु का कारण बनता है। कोक्सीडियोसिस एक गैस्ट्रोइंटेस्टाइनल बीमारी है जो कोक्सीडिया के कारण होती है, जो एक सूक्ष्म प्रोटोजोआ परजीवी जो जानवरों की आंतों की दीवारों को संक्रमित करता है।

questions.question: Matabolic reactions in our body are carried out by: > हमारे शरीर में चयापचय प्रतिक्रियाएं किसके द्वारा की जाती हैं?
questions.explanation: Metabolic reactions in the body are carried out by proteins called enzymes. These proteins act as catalysts, which mean they speed up chemical reactions without being used up. Metabolism is the process of converting food into energy through chemical reactions in the body’s cells. Metabolic reactions can be catabolic or anabolic. Catabolic reactions: Break down large molecules into smaller ones, releasing energy. Anabolic reactions: Build smaller molecules into larger ones. > शरीर में चयापचय प्रतिक्रियाएं एंजाइम नामक प्रोटीन द्वारा की जाती हैं। ये प्रोटीन उत्प्रेरक के रूप में कार्य करते हैं, जिसका अर्थ है कि वे उपयोग किए बिना रासायनिक प्रतिक्रियाओं को गति देते हैं। चयापचय शरीर की कोशिकाओं में रासायनिक प्रतिक्रियाओं के माध्यम से भोजन को ऊर्जा में परिवर्तित करने की प्रक्रिया है। मेटाबोलिक प्रतिक्रियाएं अपचय या उपचय हो सकती हैं। अपचयात्मक अभिक्रियाएँ: बड़े अणुओं को छोटे अणुओं में तोड़कर ऊर्जा मुक्त करना। एनाबॉलिक प्रतिक्रियाएं: छोटे अणुओं को बड़े अणुओं में बनाती है।

questions.question: Plan revenue expenditure relates to: I. Five-year plans II. Salaries and Pensions > योजना राजस्व व्यय से संबंधित है: I. पंचवर्षीय योजनाएं II. वेतन और पेंशन
options: Both I & II >I और II दोनों
Neither I Nor II>न तो I न ही II
questions.explanation: Plan revenue expenditure relates to Five-year plans so only I is right answer. “Plan expenditure” refers to government spending specifically allocated for projects outlined in the country’s current [five year] Plans that add to the countries productive capacity and this expenditure is further classified in two types revenue and capital expenditure. Examples:-Energy, water, communication, transportation and agricultural expenditures etc. “Non-plan expenditure” refers to Regular government spending not part of the Five-Year Plan, which usually includes salaries and pensions. > योजनागत राजस्व व्यय पंचवर्षीय योजनाओं से संबंधित है, इसलिए केवल I ही सही उत्तर है। "योजना व्यय" देश की वर्तमान [पंचवर्षीय योजना] योजनाओं में उल्लिखित परियोजनाओं के लिए विशेष रूप से आवंटित सरकारी खर्च को संदर्भित करता है जो देशों की उत्पादक क्षमता को जोड़ता है। इस व्यय को आगे दो प्रकारों में वर्गीकृत किया जाता है: राजस्व और पूंजीगत व्यय। उदाहरण: ऊर्जा, पानी, संचार, परिवहन और कृषि व्यय आदि। "गैर-योजना व्यय" नियमित सरकारी व्यय को संदर्भित करता है जो पंचवर्षीय योजना का हिस्सा नहीं है, जिसमें आमतौर पर वेतन और पेंशन शामिल होते हैं।

questions.question: Where is the headquarters of Allahabad Bank situated? > इलाहाबाद बैंक का मुख्यालय कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The headquarters of Allahabad Bank was in Kolkata, India. The bank was founded in Allahabad in 1865 and merged with Indian Bank in 2020. The headquarters of the Reserve Bank of India [RBI] is in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The RBI was established in 1935 and its headquarters were originally in Kolkata, but were moved to Mumbai in 1937. The RBI was originally privately owned, but was nationalized in 1949. > इलाहाबाद बैंक का मुख्यालय कोलकाता, भारत में था। बैंक की स्थापना 1865 में इलाहाबाद में हुई थी और 2020 में इसका इंडियन बैंक में विलय कर दिया गया था। भारतीय रिजर्व बैंक [RBI] का मुख्यालय मुंबई, महाराष्ट्र में है। आरबीआई की स्थापना 1935 में हुई थी और इसका मुख्यालय मूल रूप से कोलकाता में था, लेकिन 1937 में मुंबई स्थानांतरित कर दिया गया था। तव RBI मूल रूप से निजी स्वामित्व में था, लेकिन 1949 में राष्ट्रीयकृत किया गया था।

questions.question: Which gas is used for the manufacturing of bleaching powder? > ब्लीचिंग पाउडर के निर्माण के लिए किस गैस का उपयोग किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Chlorine gas is used to make bleaching powder. Chlorine gas reacts with dry slaked lime (Ca(OH)2) to create bleaching powder. The chemical reaction is: 2 Ca(OH)2 + 2 Cl2 → Ca(OCl)2 + CaCl2 + 2 H2O. Bleaching powder is represented as CaOCl2, though its actual composition is complex. Bleaching powder is used as an oxidizing agent in chemical industries. It is used to remove colour from fabric or fiber. It is used to disinfect after cleaning. It is used in swimming pool sanitation etc. > ब्लीचिंग पाउडर बनाने के लिए क्लोरीन गैस का इस्तेमाल किया जाता है। क्लोरीन गैस ब्लीचिंग पाउडर बनाने के लिए सूखे स्लेक्ड लाइम CaOH2 के साथ प्रतिक्रिया करती है। रासायनिक प्रतिक्रिया है: 2 CaOH2 + 2 Cl2 → CaOCl2 + CaCl2 + 2 H2O। ब्लीचिंग पाउडर को CaOCl2 के रूप में दर्शाया जाता है, हालांकि इसकी वास्तविक संरचना जटिल है। ब्लीचिंग पाउडर का उपयोग रासायनिक उद्योगों में ऑक्सीकरण एजेंट के रूप में किया जाता है। इसका उपयोग कपड़े या फाइबर से रंग निकालने के लिए किया जाता है। इसका उपयोग सफाई के बाद कीटाणुरहित करने के लिए किया जाता है। इसका उपयोग स्विमिंग पूल, स्वच्छता आदि में किया जाता है।

questions.question: Which of the following liquids can dissolve noble metals such as gold and platinum? > निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा तरल पदार्थ सोने और प्लैटिनम जैसी महान धातुओं को भंग कर सकता है?
questions.explanation: The liquid that can dissolve noble metals like gold and platinum is aqua regia. Aqua regia is a mixture of concentrated nitric acid and hydrochloric acid in a specific ratio of 1:3, and is often called “royal water” because of its ability to dissolve precious metals like gold and platinum. > तरल जो सोने और प्लैटिनम जैसी महान धातुओं को भंग कर सकता है वह एक्वा रेजिया है। एक्वा रेजिया 1: 3 के विशिष्ट अनुपात में सांद्रित नाइट्रिक एसिड और हाइड्रोक्लोरिक एसिड का मिश्रण है, और सोने और प्लैटिनम जैसी कीमती धातुओं को भंग करने की क्षमता के कारण इसे "शाही पानी" कहा जाता है।

questions.question: The twin Paradox is associated with: > जुड़वां विरोधाभास किसके साथ जुड़ा हुआ है:
options: The theory of relativity>सापेक्षता का सिद्धांत
questions.explanation: The Twin Paradox is associated with the theory of special relativity, specifically the concept of time dilation, where a moving object experiences time passing slower than for a stationary observer, resulting in the “paradox” of one twin aging less than the other if one travels at near-light speeds and returns to Earth. The theory of relativity is a set of theories proposed and published in 1905 and 1915, respectively by Albert Einstein that explains how space, time, mass, and energy relate to each other. The theory includes special relativity and general relativity. > जुड़वां विरोधाभास विशेष सापेक्षता के सिद्धांत से जुड़ा हुआ है, विशेष रूप से समय फैलाव की अवधारणा, जहां एक चलती हुई वस्तु एक स्थिर पर्यवेक्षक की तुलना में धीमी गति से गुजरने वाले समय का अनुभव करती है, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप एक जुड़वां उम्र बढ़ने का "विरोधाभास" दूसरे की तुलना में कम होता है यदि कोई निकट-प्रकाश गति से यात्रा करता है और पृथ्वी पर लौटता है। सापेक्षता का सिद्धांत अल्बर्ट आइंस्टीन द्वारा क्रमशः 1905 और 1915 में प्रस्तावित और प्रकाशित सिद्धांतों का एक समूह है जो बताता है कि अंतरिक्ष, समय, द्रव्यमान और ऊर्जा एक दूसरे से कैसे संबंधित हैं। सिद्धांत में विशेष सापेक्षता और सामान्य सापेक्षता शामिल है।

questions.question: Who won the Asian billiards Championship 2024? > एशियाई बिलियर्ड्स चैम्पियनशिप 2024 किसने जीती?
questions.explanation: Dhruv Sitwala won the 2024 Asian Billiards Championship by defeating Pankaj Advani in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The tournament was held from June 27 to July 5, 2024. This was Dhruv’s third Asian Billiards title, having previously won in 2015 and 2016. The Asian Confederation of Billiard Sports [ACBS] organized the Asian Billiards Championship. > ध्रुव सितवाला ने सऊदी अरब के रियाद में पंकज आडवाणी को हराकर 2024 एशियाई बिलियर्ड्स चैंपियनशिप जीती। टूर्नामेंट 27 जून से 5 जुलाई, 2024 तक आयोजित किया गया था। यह ध्रुव का तीसरा एशियाई बिलियर्ड्स खिताब था, इससे पहले उन्होंने 2015 और 2016 में जीत हासिल की थी। एशियन कन्फेडरेशन ऑफ बिलियर्ड स्पोर्ट्स [एसीबीएस] ने एशियन बिलियर्ड्स चैंपियनशिप का आयोजन किया।

questions.question: Which types of consumer complaints can be filed through the E-Daakhil portal? > ई-दाखिल पोर्टल के माध्यम से किस प्रकार की उपभोक्ता शिकायतें दर्ज की जा सकती हैं?
options: Sexual Harassment complaints>यौन उत्पीड़न की शिकायतें
Employee related complaints>कर्मचारी से संबंधित शिकायतें
Employer related complaints >नियोक्ता से संबंधित शिकायतें
questions.explanation: The E-Daakhil portal is an online platform for filing consumer complaints. The e-Daakhil portal was first launched on 7th September 2020 by the National Consumer Dispute Redressal Commission. By the end of 2023, it was launched in 35 States/UTs except Ladakh. Now, as the Hon’ble Lieutenant Governor of Ladakh, Brig. B.D. Mishra launched the e-Daakhil Portal in Ladakh Consumer Commission on 22nd November 2024, the platform is accessible to consumers across all regions of India, from metropolitan cities to remote areas. > ई-दाखिल पोर्टल उपभोक्ता शिकायतों को दर्ज करने के लिए एक ऑनलाइन मंच है। ई-दाखिल पोर्टल को पहली बार 7 सितंबर 2020 को राष्ट्रीय उपभोक्ता विवाद निवारण आयोग द्वारा लॉन्च किया गया था। 2023 के अंत तक, इसे लद्दाख को छोड़कर 35 राज्यों/केंद्रशासित प्रदेशों में लॉन्च किया गया था। अब, जैसा कि लद्दाख के माननीय उपराज्यपाल, ब्रिगेडियर बीडी मिश्रा ने 22 नवंबर 2024 को लद्दाख उपभोक्ता आयोग में ई-दाखिल पोर्टल लॉन्च किया, यह प्लेटफॉर्म महानगरीय शहरों से लेकर दूरदराज के क्षेत्रों तक भारत के सभी क्षेत्रों के उपभोक्ताओं के लिए सुलभ है।

questions.question: Who has been recently awarded with the prestigious Pravasi Bharatiya Samman Award in public Affairs field? > हाल ही में सार्वजनिक मामलों के क्षेत्र में प्रतिष्ठित प्रवासी भारतीय सम्मान पुरस्कार से किसे सम्मानित किया गया है?
options: Dr Lekh Raj Juneja>डॉ लेख राज जुनेजा
questions.explanation: H.E. Christine Carla Kangaloo has been awarded the Pravasi Bharatiya Samman Award in the Public Affairs category. She is the President of Trinidad and Tobago. The 18th Pravasi Bharatiya Divas Convention [PBD], 2025 was held in partnership with the Government of Odisha in Bhubaneshwar, Odisha from 8 to 10 January 2025. This award was given to 27 awardees from 23 nations. This was the first PBD to be held in Eastern India. > महामहिम क्रिस्टीन कार्ला कंगालू को सार्वजनिक मामलों की श्रेणी में प्रवासी भारतीय सम्मान पुरस्कार से सम्मानित किया गया है। वह त्रिनिदाद और टोबैगो की राष्ट्रपति हैं। 18वां प्रवासी भारतीय दिवस सम्मेलन [PBD], 2025 ओडिशा सरकार के साथ साझेदारी में 8 से 10 जनवरी 2025 तक भुवनेश्वर, ओडिशा में आयोजित किया गया था। यह पुरस्कार 23 देशों के 27 पुरस्कार विजेताओं को दिया गया। यह पूर्वी भारत में आयोजित होने वाला पहला प्रवासी भारतीय सम्मान था।

questions.question: India’s rank in the Global Firepower Index 2025? > ग्लोबल फायरपावर इंडेक्स 2025 में भारत की रैंक?
questions.explanation: According to the Global Firepower Index 2025, India is ranked 4th with $75 billion defence expenditure. 1. United States toped the ranking with $895 billion defence budget. 2. China $266.85 billion 3. Russia $126 billion > ग्लोबल फायरपावर इंडेक्स 2025 के अनुसार, भारत 75 बिलियन डॉलर के रक्षा व्यय के साथ चौथे स्थान पर है। 1. संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका $ 895 बिलियन रक्षा बजट के साथ रैंकिंग में सबसे ऊपर है। 2. चीन $ 266.85 बिलियन 3. रूस $ 126 बिलियन

questions.question: If Amit’s income is 65% of Arun’s income, then what percent of Amit’s income is Arun’s income? [Correct to two decimal places]
A can complete a piece of work in 30 days while B can complete the same work in 40 days. They work on alternate basis, starting with A. In how many days 50% of the work will be completed?
questions.explanation: Total work to be done = 60 4 unit work will be done by A in one day 3 unit work will be done by B in one day 7 unit work---------------- 2days 56 unit work---------------16 days 4 unit work-----------------1 day by A Total = 16+1 = 17 days

questions.question: The expression [425+426+427+428] is divisible by? > व्यंजक [425+426+427+428] किससे विभाज्य है?
options: All of the above>ऊपर के सभी

questions.question: Study the following table and answer the following questions:- The table shows population of 5 cities in different years. Population in city B,C and E in 2020 is how much percent more/less than population of city A,D and C in the year 2021?
If [5a – 1/3a]=5, then find the value of [9a2+1/25a2]=? > यदि [5a – 1/3a]=5 है, तो [9a2+1/25a2] का मान ज्ञात कीजिये?
If tan[a+b]=1 and cot[a-b]=√3 find the value of a? > यदि tan[a+b]=1 और cot[a-b]=√3 तो a का मान ज्ञात कीजिये?
If the four number 45, 180, 19 and y in proportion, find the value of y? > यदि चार संख्याएँ 45, 180, 19 और y समानुपात में हों, तो y का मान ज्ञात कीजिए?
Find the volume of the sphere if the diameter of the sphere is 8.4 cm?
If [a+b+c] = 2, [a2+b2+c2]=6, find the value of [ab+bc+ca]?
questions.explanation: [a+b+c]2 = a2+b2+c2+2[ab+bc+ca] 4 = 6+2[ab+bc+ca] - 2[ab+bc+ca] = 2 ab+bc+ca=-1

questions.question: A shopkeeper sold an item worth Rs. 12,000 after two successive discount of 10% and 8% respectively. Find the selling price of the item?
In what time will Rs. 20,000 at 5% per annum simple interest, produce same interest as Rs. 15,000 does in 4 years at 4% simple interest?
In what ratio must water be mixed with milk costing Rs. 30 per litre, in order to get a mixture costing Rs. 25 per litre?
questions.explanation: Water : Milk= 1 : 5 > पानी : दूध = 1 : 5

questions.question: Find the LCM of the following expression [x2-y2], [x4-y4], [x+y]2, [x3-y3]

In a race around a circular track of 75 km, two cyclists are riding at a speed of 20 km/hr and 30 km/hr in the same direction. After what time [in hr] will they meet at for the first time after starting their journey?

Find the compound interest on a sum of Rs. 23,800 at the rate of 12% per annum for 1.5 year compounded six monthly? > 23,800 रुपये की राशि पर 12% प्रति वर्ष की दर से 1.5 वर्ष के लिए छह मासिक चक्रवृद्धि ब्याज ज्ञात कीजिए।

A shopkeeper uses 910 gm weight in place of one kg weight. He sells it at 10% profit what will be the actual profit percentage [corrected upto two decimal] ? > एक दुकानदार एक किलोग्राम वजन के स्थान पर 910 ग्राम वजन का उपयोग करता है। वह इसे 10% लाभ पर बेचता है। वास्तविक लाभ प्रतिशत क्या होगा [दो दशमलव तक संशोधित]?
Let PQR ~ ACB be two similar triangle such that PQ = 13cm, PR =12cm, AB=36cm, find the length of AC.
Population of Males in six villages in 2023: Population of male in village D in 2023 was 10,400. What was the malepopulation of village A in 2023? Total population of these six villages is 100%?
Simplify > को सरल करें
A train 600m long is running at 90 km/h. How long will it take to clear a man standing on 400m long platform?

The average of 30 numbers was found to be 50. It was detected that 76 was misread as 67. Find the correct average of the given numbers? > 30 संख्याओं का औसत 50 पाया गया। यह पाया गया कि 76 को गलती से 67 पढ़ लिया गया था। दी गई संख्याओं का सही औसत ज्ञात कीजिए।
questions.explanation: Correct average = 50 + = 50 + = 50.3 > सही औसत = 50 + = 50 + = 50.3

questions.question: Two concentric circles of centre O are drawn. A chord is drawn to the bigger circle with radius 13cm, which is tangent to the smaller circle. Perpendicular drawn from the centre O to the chord meet at B, if OB=5cm, find the value of chord? > केंद्र O वाले दो संकेन्द्रीय वृत्त खींचे गए हैं। 13 सेमी त्रिज्या वाले बड़े वृत्त पर एक जीवा खींची गई है, जो छोटे वृत्त की स्पर्श रेखा है। केंद्र O से जीवा पर खींचा गया लम्ब B पर मिलता है, यदि OB=5 सेमी है, तो जीवा का मान ज्ञात कीजिए?
questions.explanation: Value of chord = = 12×2 = 24 > Value of chord = = 12×2 = 24

questions.question: In the given figure PAB is a secant and PT is a tangent to the circle from a point P. If PT = 10, PA = 5 and AB = y, then find the value of y ? > दी गई आकृति में PAB एक छेदक रेखा है और PT एक बिंदु P से वृत्त पर स्पर्श रेखा है। यदि PT = 10, PA = 5 और AB = y है, तो y का मान ज्ञात कीजिए।
Pipe A can fill a tank in 18 hrs. Pipe B can fill the same tank in 24 hrs. If both the pipes are opened simultaneously, how much time will they take to fill the empty tank?
The angle of elevation of a tower of height h from point A and B from the distance of 60√3 m and 20√3 m respectively, situated at the opposite side of the tower are 30° and 60°. Find the value of h.
questions.explanation: AD = 60√3 m BD = 20√3 m Height = h = = 60 m

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The error lies in segment: None of the two candidates. Explanation: • The word "None" is used when referring to more than two people or things. • When referring to exactly two people or things, the correct word is "Neither." • In this sentence, segment [A] uses "None of the two candidates," which is incorrect because there are only two candidates. • The correct phrase should be "Neither of the two candidates." Corrected Sentence: Neither of the two candidates was found suitable for the position.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The scientist’s theory was initially rejected, but it was later __________ by new evidence.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Validated Explanation: The word "validated" is the correct choice as it means proven to be correct or true. It fits perfectly in this context, where the sentence is about a theory that was first rejected but later supported by new evidence. Here are the meanings and examples of all options: • Validated – प्रमाणित किया गया, सत्यापित – Means something that is confirmed or proven true. Example: Her findings were validated by later experiments. • Violated – उल्लंघन किया – Means to break or disobey a rule or law. Example: He violated the traffic rules by speeding. • Vanished – गायब हो गया – Means to disappear suddenly. Example: The keys vanished from the table. • Criticised – आलोचना की गई – Means to express disapproval or point out faults. Example: The book was criticised for its weak plot. Final Correct Sentence: The scientist’s theory was initially rejected, but it was later validated by new evidence.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. I have visited my grandparents yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Visited Explanation: • The sentence refers to a specific past time — "yesterday." • When a specific time in the past is mentioned, the correct tense to use is Simple Past, not Present Perfect. • "Have visited" is Present Perfect, which is used when the exact time is not mentioned or when the action has relevance to the present. • Therefore, "Visited" [Simple Past] is the correct form for an action completed at a definite time in the past.

questions.question: Select the Grammatically correct sentence -
options: Hardly had she arrived than the meeting started.
Hardly she had arrived when the meeting started.
Hardly she had arrived but the meeting started.
Hardly had she arrived when the meeting started.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Hardly had she arrived when the meeting started. Explanation: • This sentence is grammatically correct and uses the co-relative conjunction pair "Hardly – when" properly. • The structure “Hardly had + subject + past participle + when + clause” is the standard format. • The sentence means that no sooner had she arrived than the meeting started. • Option [A] & [C] is incorrect because “than” and “but” is wrongly used with "Hardly." The correct pair is “Hardly – when,” not “Hardly – than.” • Option [B] is incorrect because the auxiliary verb "had" must come before the subject ["she"] in this inverted structure. Final Correct Sentence: Hardly had she arrived when the meeting started.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. The firefighters managed to put off the blaze within an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Put out Explanation: The phrasal verb "put out" means to extinguish a fire, which fits the context where the firefighters are stopping the blaze. The original sentence incorrectly uses "put off," which means to postpone or delay, and does not fit the meaning. Meanings and examples of the options: • Put out – आग बुझाना – To extinguish something burning. Example: The crew worked quickly to put out the fire. • Put away – हटा देना / रख देना – To store or tidy up. Example: She put away the books after reading. • Put down – नीचे रखना / कुचलना – To place something or suppress forcefully. Example: The rebellion was put down quickly. • Put off – टालना – To postpone something. Example: They put off the meeting until next week. Final Correct Sentence: The firefighters managed to put out the blaze within an hour.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct. A person is known _____ the company he keeps.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: By Explanation: • The phrase "known by" is used to indicate the basis or reason for recognition or reputation. • In the sentence, "A person is known by the company he keeps," "by" correctly shows that the person’s reputation depends on the people around him. • The other prepositions do not fit idiomatic usage here. Meanings of the other options: • To – Used to indicate direction, recipient, or relation but not appropriate here. Example: She is known to everyone. [means ‘everyone knows her’] • With & At –not suitable here Corrected Sentence: A person is known by the company he keeps.

questions.question: Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: I received the last updates Explanation: • The word "last" means final — implying there will be no more updates. • The word "latest" means the most recent, which fits the context of receiving recent information about an event. • Since updates may continue to come, using "last" is incorrect. • Therefore, "latest updates" is the correct phrase. Corrected Sentence: I received the latest updates about the event just a few minutes ago.

questions.question: Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph: A. It makes air, water, and land dirty. B. Pollution is harmful to our earth. C. Air pollution is caused by smoke from cars and factories. D. There are many types of pollution.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: BADC Explanation: Let’s break it down step by step: • Sentence B introduces the main idea that pollution is harmful to our earth, starting the paragraph clearly. • Sentence A follows by explaining what pollution does—it makes air, water, and land dirty—supporting the first sentence. • Sentence D then expands on this by mentioning that there are many types of pollution, preparing the reader for examples. • Sentence C provides an example of one type of pollution, air pollution, caused by smoke from cars and factories, adding detail and clarity. Final Paragraph: Pollution is harmful to our earth. It makes air, water, and land dirty. There are many types of pollution. Air pollution is caused by smoke from cars and factories.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of the given sentence. The chef will prepare the meal by 7 PM.
options: The meal was prepared by the chef by 7 PM.
The meal will be prepared by the chef by 7 PM.
The meal is being prepared by the chef by 7 PM.
The meal has been prepared by the chef by 7 PM.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: The meal will be prepared by the chef by 7 PM. Explanation: • The original sentence is in the future simple tense: "will prepare." • To change it into passive voice, the structure is: Subject + will + be + past participle. • Here, "prepare" changes to "be prepared." • The agent "by the chef" is correctly included. • The time phrase "by 7 PM" remains unchanged as it indicates when the action will be completed. Corrected Sentence: The meal will be prepared by the chef by 7 PM.

questions.question: Change the narration of the given sentence. She said, “How can a Dog talk?”
options: She asked how can a dog talk.
She said how can a dog talk.
She asked how a dog could talk.
She said how a dog could talk.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: She asked how a dog could talk. Explanation: • The original sentence is in direct speech, with a question format. • When changing from direct to indirect speech, the question format changes to a statement format. • The modal "can" changes to "could" to reflect past reporting. • The word order changes from "How can a dog talk?" to "how a dog could talk." • The reporting verb "said" changes to "asked" because it is a question. Corrected Sentence: She asked how a dog could talk.

questions.question: In the past week, hundreds of Zepto delivery workers in Hyderabad have gone on an indefinite strike. Their demands are basic: Fair pay, decent working hours, social security, and ____1____. These are not new demands, nor are they unreasonable. Coordinated by the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers’ Union (TGPWU), the strike follows a ____2____ pattern of workers unrest across India’s platform economy, from Blinkit to Swiggy, where the promise of entrepreneurial freedom has worn ____3____ under the weight of wage theft, surveillance, and hyper-precarity. In Delhi, 50 Zepto workers recently filed a complaint alleging they were lured ____4____ rural areas with promises of ₹30,000 per month, free food, and accommodation. Upon arrival, they faced substandard living conditions, pay cuts, and withheld wages. Zepto has since responded with a familiar script: ____5____ itself from the workers through legalistic disavowals. “We are a technology platform,” the company claims. “Vendors are responsible for hiring and payment.” This arm’s-length logic is by design. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 is dignity. The context suggests that the workers are seeking respect and fair treatment in their working conditions, which aligns with the concept of dignity. The other options don't fit as well: - Affinity implies a connection or liking, which doesn't fit the context of workers' demands. - Normality implies a state of being normal, which doesn't relate to the workers' demands for better working conditions. - Vicinity implies proximity or nearness, which doesn't fit the context of workers' demands.

questions.question: In the past week, hundreds of Zepto delivery workers in Hyderabad have gone on an indefinite strike. Their demands are basic: Fair pay, decent working hours, social security, and ____1____. These are not new demands, nor are they unreasonable. Coordinated by the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers’ Union (TGPWU), the strike follows a ____2____ pattern of workers unrest across India’s platform economy, from Blinkit to Swiggy, where the promise of entrepreneurial freedom has worn ____3____ under the weight of wage theft, surveillance, and hyper-precarity. In Delhi, 50 Zepto workers recently filed a complaint alleging they were lured ____4____ rural areas with promises of ₹30,000 per month, free food, and accommodation. Upon arrival, they faced substandard living conditions, pay cuts, and withheld wages. Zepto has since responded with a familiar script: ____5____ itself from the workers through legalistic disavowals. “We are a technology platform,” the company claims. “Vendors are responsible for hiring and payment.” This arm’s-length logic is by design. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 2 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The most appropriate option to fill in the blank 2 is growing. The context suggests that there is an increasing trend of worker unrest across India's platform economy, which aligns with the concept of "growing". This implies that the issue is becoming more prevalent or widespread. The other options don't fit as well: - Decaying implies a decline or deterioration, which is the opposite of what's described. - Alleviating implies reducing or mitigating a problem, which doesn't fit the context of increasing worker unrest. - Commemorating implies celebrating or honoring something, which doesn't fit the context of worker unrest.

questions.question: In the past week, hundreds of Zepto delivery workers in Hyderabad have gone on an indefinite strike. Their demands are basic: Fair pay, decent working hours, social security, and ____1____. These are not new demands, nor are they unreasonable. Coordinated by the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers’ Union (TGPWU), the strike follows a ____2____ pattern of workers unrest across India’s platform economy, from Blinkit to Swiggy, where the promise of entrepreneurial freedom has worn ____3____ under the weight of wage theft, surveillance, and hyper-precarity. In Delhi, 50 Zepto workers recently filed a complaint alleging they were lured ____4____ rural areas with promises of ₹30,000 per month, free food, and accommodation. Upon arrival, they faced substandard living conditions, pay cuts, and withheld wages. Zepto has since responded with a familiar script: ____5____ itself from the workers through legalistic disavowals. “We are a technology platform,” the company claims. “Vendors are responsible for hiring and payment.” This arm’s-length logic is by design. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 3 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The idiom "worn thin" means to become weak, fragile, or less convincing due to strain, criticism, or overuse. In this context, it implies that the promise of entrepreneurial freedom is no longer believable or sustainable due to the harsh realities faced by the workers.

questions.question: In the past week, hundreds of Zepto delivery workers in Hyderabad have gone on an indefinite strike. Their demands are basic: Fair pay, decent working hours, social security, and ____1____. These are not new demands, nor are they unreasonable. Coordinated by the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers’ Union (TGPWU), the strike follows a ____2____ pattern of workers unrest across India’s platform economy, from Blinkit to Swiggy, where the promise of entrepreneurial freedom has worn ____3____ under the weight of wage theft, surveillance, and hyper-precarity. In Delhi, 50 Zepto workers recently filed a complaint alleging they were lured ____4____ rural areas with promises of ₹30,000 per month, free food, and accommodation. Upon arrival, they faced substandard living conditions, pay cuts, and withheld wages. Zepto has since responded with a familiar script: ____5____ itself from the workers through legalistic disavowals. “We are a technology platform,” the company claims. “Vendors are responsible for hiring and payment.” This arm’s-length logic is by design. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 4 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The phrase "lured from" implies that the workers were attracted or enticed to leave their rural areas with false promises. This fits the context of the workers being misled about the conditions they would face. Lured Into would imply being lured into something, which doesn't fit as smoothly in this context.

questions.question: In the past week, hundreds of Zepto delivery workers in Hyderabad have gone on an indefinite strike. Their demands are basic: Fair pay, decent working hours, social security, and ____1____. These are not new demands, nor are they unreasonable. Coordinated by the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers’ Union (TGPWU), the strike follows a ____2____ pattern of workers unrest across India’s platform economy, from Blinkit to Swiggy, where the promise of entrepreneurial freedom has worn ____3____ under the weight of wage theft, surveillance, and hyper-precarity. In Delhi, 50 Zepto workers recently filed a complaint alleging they were lured ____4____ rural areas with promises of ₹30,000 per month, free food, and accommodation. Upon arrival, they faced substandard living conditions, pay cuts, and withheld wages. Zepto has since responded with a familiar script: ____5____ itself from the workers through legalistic disavowals. “We are a technology platform,” the company claims. “Vendors are responsible for hiring and payment.” This arm’s-length logic is by design. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 5 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The context suggests that Zepto is trying to separate or dissociate itself from the workers' issues by claiming it's just a technology platform and not responsible for their employment conditions. "Distancing" fits perfectly in this context, as it implies creating a separation or detachment. The other options don't fit as well: - Forwarding implies moving something ahead or sending it forward, which doesn't fit the context. - Alleging implies making a claim or assertion, which doesn't fit the context of Zepto's response. - Condemning implies strongly criticizing or disapproving, which is the opposite of what Zepto is doing in this context.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. This Indian car is _________ though cheaper than the other foreign cars.
questions.explanation: ‘As good as’ is used to compare two nouns of similar quality.

questions.question: Identify the word that is correctly spelt.
questions.explanation: ‘Embroidery’ is the correct spelling.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate SYNONYM of the underlined word in the following sentence - She was a short, gray-haired, ROTUND woman of weary carriage and a dignity appropriate to her remarkable birth.
questions.explanation: ROTUND means ROUND.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. INSIDIUOS
questions.explanation: - Insidious - कपटी, धूर्ततापूर्ण - Subtle but harmful or deceitful. - Example: "The insidious effects of the disease were not immediately apparent." - Pretentious - दिखावटी, ढोंगी - Claiming or pretending to be something one is not, often to impress others. - Example: "The pretentious art critic used overly complex language to describe the simple painting." - Deceptive - धोखा देने वाला, भ्रामक - Intentionally misleading or false. - Example: "The company's deceptive advertising practices led to a lawsuit." - Benevolent - दयालु, परोपकारी - Kind, generous, and showing goodwill. - Example: "The benevolent philanthropist donated millions to charity." - Crafty - चतुर, धूर्त - Cunning, sly, or skillful in a secretive way. - Example: "The crafty salesperson convinced me to buy more than I needed."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning for the given idiom. Run Into
questions.explanation: ‘Run into’ means to meet someone accidently.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate SYNONYM of the given word. OSTRACISE
questions.explanation: - Ostracise - समाज से बहिष्कृत करना - To exclude someone from a group or society. - Example: "The community ostracised the individual for their controversial views." - Banish - निर्वासित करना - To officially force someone to leave a place or country. - Example: "The king banished the rebel from the kingdom." - Outdated - पुराना, अनुपयोगी - No longer needed, useful, or relevant. - Example: "The outdated technology was replaced with newer models." - Censure - निंदा करना - To criticize or condemn someone or something strongly. - Example: "The politician was censured for their unethical behavior." - Occasional - कभी-कभी होने वाला - Happening or done sometimes, but not regularly. - Example: "She enjoys occasional trips to the beach."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the following sentence- Truth fears not the flames of SLANDER and injustice.
questions.explanation: Slander means a false spoken statement about someone that damages their reputation & Praise means to express admiration or approval of the achievements or characteristics of a person or thing.

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words. A person who is physically dependant on any substance
questions.explanation: - Casanova - प्रणयी, प्रेमी - A man known for having many romantic conquests or lovers. - Example: "He was known as a Casanova among his friends for his numerous romantic escapades." - Abattoir - बूचड़खाना - A slaughterhouse where animals are killed for meat. - Example: "The abattoir was inspected for hygiene and safety standards." - Nomadic - घुमंतू - Moving from place to place without a fixed home, often in search of food or grazing land. - Example: "The nomadic tribe traveled across the desert in search of water and pasture." - Hophead - एक प्रकार का व्यक्ति जो हॉप्स (बियर में उपयोग होने वाला एक घटक) का शौकीन होता है - A slang term for someone who is enthusiastic about hops or craft beer. - Example: "As a hophead, he spent hours exploring different craft breweries and sampling unique beers."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Pocket an insult
questions.explanation: To pocket an insult means to endure or tolerate an insult without reacting or showing offense. It implies swallowing one's pride and choosing not to respond to a provocation or slight. - Pocket an insult - अपमान को सहन करना - Example: "He pocketed the insult and continued the conversation calmly."

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words given. Government run by a small group of people
questions.explanation: Aristocracy :- A form of government that places strength in the hands of a small, privileged ruling class Plutocracy :- System of government by the wealthy Monarchy :- System of government or rule by a king or a queen.
